data-fetching-demo.page.title: Data-fetching foundation demo
data-fetching-demo.page.subtitle: Internal-only dev tour of every foundation use case. Each card exercises one mechanism end-to-end. Real `/user`, `/memberships`, `/zones?name=` calls for happy paths and 404; simulated `ApiError` for 401 / 403 / 422 / 429 / 5xx / network (which the dev environment can’t reliably produce on demand).
data-fetching-demo.cards.suspenseCompari: useApiSuspenseQuery against /zones?name=… — `data` is always defined inside the card body. Loading + errors handled by the surrounding <ApiSuspense>.
data-fetching-demo.cards.nonSuspenseComp: useApiQuery against the same endpoint — caller branches inline on `isPending`, `isError`, and `data`. No Suspense boundary.
data-fetching-demo.cards.comparison.empt: Enter a zone name to fetch.
data-fetching-demo.cards.read.title: 3. Suspense read (Mode 1)
data-fetching-demo.cards.read.descriptio: useApiSuspenseQuery against /user — the page suspends while the request is in flight.
data-fetching-demo.cards.parallelRead.de: useApiSuspenseQueries — fans out /user and /memberships under one Suspense boundary; resolves only when both succeed.
data-fetching-demo.cards.conditionalRead: useApiQuery with `enabled` toggle. No fetch until the toggle is on.
data-fetching-demo.cards.multipleNonSusp: Two parallel-read shapes side by side. Empty input shows the first page of the current account’s zones via useApiList; typing comma-separated names switches to useApiQueries fanning out per-name /zones?name=… lookups (per-entry auto-toast on failure).
No account in the URL. Visit this page under /:accountId/demo/data-fetching to see real zones.
No zones in this account yet.
data-fetching-demo.cards.mutationSuccess: useApiMutation against a no-op endpoint. Success toast.
data-fetching-demo.cards.mutationFailure: useApiMutation against a deliberately-invalid endpoint. Auto-toast fires for the resulting 404.
useApiMutation with `notifyOnError: false` — read `error.firstErrorMessage` and render inline.
data-fetching-demo.cards.errorTour.title: 10. Error type tour
data-fetching-demo.cards.errorTour.descr: Each button surfaces the matching <ApiErrorState> component. 401 / 403 / 422 / 429 / 5xx / 4xx / offline / timeout are simulated; 404 hits a real missing /zones?name= resource.
data-fetching-demo.cards.override.title: 11. Per-type override
data-fetching-demo.cards.override.descri: <ApiErrorState renderForbidden={…}> swaps the default 403 component for caller-supplied UI.
data-fetching-demo.cards.override.custom: This page replaces the default <PermissionDenied> for 403s.
data-fetching-demo.cards.manualNotify.de: Call `notifyApiError(toast, error)` directly from a click handler. The function is a no-op for non-ApiError inputs.
data-fetching-demo.cards.manualRefetch.d: useApiQuery exposes refetch(). Click the button to re-run /user without unmounting; isFetching toggles during the network round-trip.
data-fetching-demo.cards.infiniteQuery.d: useApiList paginates the real /zones?account.id=…&per_page=2&page=N endpoint. per_page is intentionally 2 (not a realistic value) so the demo paginates even on accounts with only a handful of zones; real callers should pick 25–50. Click "Load more" to fetch the next page; first-page error toasts via Mode 2, subsequent-page errors surface in `error` without unmounting.
data-fetching-demo.cards.infiniteQuery.n: No account in the URL. Visit this page under /:accountId/demo/data-fetching.
data-fetching-demo.cards.optimisticMutat: useApiMutation flips a local counter optimistically on click. Every odd click fails deterministically (so reviewers see rollback on the 1st, 3rd, 5th… click); failures roll back the counter and auto-toast.
data-fetching-demo.cards.errorBodyMutati: useApiMutation against a simulated endpoint that returns HTTP 403 with a non-envelope JSON body. parseError attaches the typed body to error.errorBody; the card narrows with the same schema and renders the reason inline.
